2606.08702.title: ConMem: Structured Memory-Guided Adaptation in Training-Free Multi-Agent Systems
2606.08702.paper_summary: Recent advances have improved the adaptive capabilities of LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) through memory-, skill-, and learning-based approaches, yet these approaches remain challenged by noisy trajectories, insufficient modeling of memory-skill relations, and reliance on additional training or high-quality supervision. To address these limitations, we propose ConMem, a relation-aware and training-free framework that enables efficient multi-agent adaptation through cross-experience coordination. Specifically, ConMem distills historical interaction trajectories into structured memory cards to capture reusable strategies and cues, organizing them into a relation-aware memory graph. At runtime, ConMem retrieves cards according to task needs and coordinates them through the card graph to resolve strategy conflicts and recover their dependencies. Combined, these modules yield structured and relation-aware guidance, enabling robust, lightweight adaptation in multi-agent systems without additional training. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and mainstream MAS architectures show consistent gains over existing memory architectures, with improved inference-time efficiency through pruning more than 50% of expanded candidates and reducing planning overhead by over 80%. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ConMemCode
2606.08702.paper_summary_zh: 最近的進展通過基於記憶、技能和學習的方法改善了基於LLM的多智能體系統（MAS）的適應能力，然而這些方法仍然面臨著噪聲軌跡、記憶-技能關係建模不足以及依賴額外訓練或高質量監督的挑戰。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了ConMem，一個關係感知且無需訓練的框架，通過跨經驗協調實現高效的多智能體適應。具體而言，ConMem將歷史互動軌跡提煉為結構化記憶卡，以捕捉可重用的策略和提示，並將其組織成一個關係感知的記憶圖。在運行時，ConMem根據任務需求檢索卡片，並通過卡片圖協調它們以解決策略衝突並恢復它們的依賴關係。這些模塊的結合產生了結構化和關係感知的指導，使得在多智能體系統中實現穩健、輕量級的適應而無需額外訓練。在多個基準和主流MAS架構上的廣泛實驗顯示，與現有的記憶架構相比，取得了一致的增益，並通過修剪超過50%的擴展候選者來提高推理時間效率，將計劃開銷降低超過80%。我們的代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ConMemCode 獲得。
2606.08702.author: Zhixun Tan et.al.
2606.08702.authors: Zhixun Tan, Qiang Chen, Tairan Huang, Xiu Su, Yi Chen
